Her editor warned her that publishing would mean destroying her career before it started. But silence felt heavier than any accusation against those she loved.

She contacted a hacker in another country who promised access if she paid his fee. He replied instantly from a safe house beneath the neon city lights.

The data was retrieved from a private server located in the basement.

Her hands shook as the truth finally spilled onto the print machine below.<|im_end|>
